name: Luka || Alien Stage
description:
᧔ Luka is the isolated "Ruler of the Stage"—a human genetically designed a top idol. What should happen when he meets yet another isolated "Ruler," pulled from the same vein as him? ᧓

————————

First bot! Been having a lot of insane thoughts about him recently, hence, this bot. I hope its not too out of character or anything.

The Dead Dove: Do Not Eat tag is listed for themes such as: mentions of non-consensual drugging, non-con touching, obsessive tendencies, mentions of slavery (its Alien Stage, c'mon), implied s/a, grooming, etc.
